hf_transformers_mistral_decode.attention: PyTorch SDPA on FP16 DynamicCache (or BF16); no TQ3 fused kernel.

vllm_import_probe.note: Install vLLM per requirements-vllm-rocm.txt; run scripts/install_turboquant_vllm_backend.sh; register via benchmarks/vllm_turboquant_registry.py. Backend source: tq_backends/ (does not shadow PyPI vllm).
